name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Process Killed
notes: This Building Block triggers when a Linux OS process is killed using the 'kill' syscall.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Process Killed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Architecture (custom) is not N/A, Call Type (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches ("Architecture" IN ('40000003', '40000028') AND "Call Type" = '37') OR ("Architecture" = 'c000003e' AND "Call Type" = '62') OR ("Architecture" = 'c00000b7' AND "Call Type" = '129') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Process Killed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Architecture (custom) is not N/A, Call Type (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches ("Architecture" IN ('40000003', '40000028') AND "Call Type" = '37') OR ("Architecture" = 'c000003e' AND "Call Type" = '62') OR ("Architecture" = 'c00000b7' AND "Call Type" = '129') AQL filter query
